mapper.select: SELECT * FROM vr.tn_vr_team WHERE vr_id = #{vrId} ORDER BY team_sn
SELECT * FROM vr.tn_vr_team WHERE vr_id = #{vrId} AND team_sn = #{teamSn}
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(team_sn), 0) FROM vr.tn_vr_team WHERE vr_id = #{vrId}
mapper.update: UPDATE vr.tn_vr_team SET role_cd = #{roleCd}, user_nm = #{userNm}, accrd_dtl = #{accrdDtl}, conscutv_cnt = #{conscutvCnt}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE vr_id = #{vrId} AND team_sn = #{teamSn}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM vr.tn_vr_team WHERE vr_id = #{vrId} AND team_sn = #{teamSn}
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(conscutv_cnt) FROM vr.tn_vr_team WHERE vr_id = #{vrId} AND role_cd = 'LEAD'
